message:
fix: UTF-8 safe string handling in update and denial modules

- update.rs: Fix release notes truncation to use char count instead of
  byte slicing. The previous `&body[..497]` could panic if truncation
  point fell within a multi-byte UTF-8 character.

- denial.rs: Fix header length calculation in ASCII render to use
  `chars().count()` instead of `len()` for consistency with Unicode
  render and correct handling of non-ASCII characters.

- denial.rs: Fix wrap_text function to track character count instead of
  byte length, preventing premature line wrapping with UTF-8 text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
